summary: Completed comprehensive testing of NutriScan AI food label scanner app. All core functionality working correctly including backend API endpoints, frontend UI components, scan flow, analysis simulation, and results display.

design_issues.issue: Missing Description or aria-describedby attribute for accessibility

passed_tests: Backend API root endpoint returns correct response
POST /api/analyze endpoint returns valid nutritional data with all required fields
Landing page loads with proper dark theme (rgb(9, 9, 11))
Large green scan button is visible and clickable
Scan button opens camera modal with proper UI
Modal contains upload and analyze buttons
Analyze button triggers loading state with spinner animation
Analysis completes and shows results view with product data
Results display 8 nutrient cards with proper values
Results show 3 warnings and 3 recommendations sections
Back button returns to home page successfully
Footer contains all 3 required legal links (Privacy, Terms, Contact)
Spanish language content displays correctly throughout app

success_percentage.frontend: 95% - All major functionality working, minor accessibility warning
